name: @qvac/fabric
description: Shared bare addon hosting the qvac-fabric (forked llama.cpp + ggml) runtime for QVAC inference addons

scripts.build: bare-make generate && bare-make build && bare-make install
scripts.mobile:copy-prebuilds: cp -r prebuilds/android-arm64 prebuilds/android-ia32 || echo 'Warning: Failed to copy fabric prebuilds to android-ia32'; cp -r prebuilds/android-arm64 prebuilds/android-arm || echo 'Warning: Failed to copy fabric prebuilds to android-arm'; cp -r prebuilds/android-arm64 prebuilds/android-x64 || echo 'Warning: Failed to copy fabric prebuilds to android-x64'; cp -r prebuilds/ios-arm64 prebuilds/ios-arm64-simulator 2>/dev/null || echo 'iOS prebuilds already present'; cp -r prebuilds/ios-arm64 prebuilds/ios-x64-simulator 2>/dev/null || echo 'iOS prebuilds already present'

author: Tether
